findings.title: collect-repo-facts absolute OutputPath fails

evidence.note: OutputPath is always joined with the current location before GetFullPath.
Absolute OutputPath reproduction failed with NotSupportedException.

findings.impact: Users who pass an absolute artifact path can hit the same path-format failure previously fixed in summarize-review-history.ps1, reducing trust in report persistence automation.
findings.recommendation: Extract the Resolve-InputPath helper pattern into collect-repo-facts.ps1 and add smoke coverage for absolute OutputPath.
notes: summarize-review-history.ps1 absolute path behavior passed in this review.
Verified closed on 2026-05-15: absolute OutputPath now writes and parses successfully.

findings.title: run-safe-checks does not discover PowerShell project validation scripts

evidence.note: results is an empty array for this PowerShell/documentation project.
Discovery covers package.json scripts, Python tests, and optional Docker config, but not repository-defined PowerShell validation scripts.

findings.impact: A review can report no safe checks even when the repository has real validation entry points such as verify-project.ps1 and test-harness-smoke.ps1.
findings.recommendation: Teach run-safe-checks.ps1 to detect and run conservative PowerShell validation scripts, or add a documented allowlist/config file for repo-specific checks.
notes: Verified closed on 2026-05-15: run-safe-checks now reports powershell:verify-project and powershell:test-harness-smoke as passed in direct execution.

findings.title: install-user-skill WhatIf prints a misleading success message

evidence.note: Installed skill message is printed outside the ShouldProcess install branch.
-WhatIf printed WhatIf operations and then Installed skill to, although no copy was performed.

findings.impact: Operators and future AI sessions may believe the global skill was refreshed when a dry run only simulated the action.
findings.recommendation: Track whether the install branch actually executed and print a distinct dry-run completion message under -WhatIf.
notes: Verified closed on 2026-05-15: -WhatIf output no longer includes Installed skill to and includes an explicit dry-run completion message.

findings.title: usage guide has a duplicated notice before the title

evidence.note: A code-health-reports notice appears before the # Usage heading.
The same notice also appears in the intended closure-artifact section.

findings.impact: The first rendered heading is no longer the document title, and duplicated guidance makes the usage guide look less polished.
findings.recommendation: Remove the line-1 duplicate and keep the closure-artifact note in its contextual section.
notes: Verified closed on 2026-05-15: docs/usage.md starts with # Usage and the report-directory notice appears once.

findings.title: smoke test leaves an empty .tmp parent directory

evidence.note: After test-harness-smoke.ps1, Test-Path .\code-health-review-harness\.tmp returned True, and the directory was empty.
Cleanup removes child directories but not the empty .tmp parent.

findings.impact: The project stays functionally correct, but repeated local validation leaves ignored workspace residue and weakens the expectation that smoke tests clean up after themselves.
findings.recommendation: Remove .tmp when it is empty after cleanup, or document that the parent cache directory is intentionally retained.
notes: Verified closed on 2026-05-15: smoke test passes and .tmp is absent after cleanup.
